User.title: User Profile
User.description: Public profile configuration and user role details.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth user ID.

username.description: Display username selected by the player.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's profile avatar.

isBanned.description: Flag indicating if the user is suspended from discussions.

createdAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the user profile was initialized.

Favorite.title: Favorite Game
Favorite.description: Association representing a user's favorited game.

userId.description: Reference UID of the user who favorited the game.

gameId.description: Unique identifier of the favorited game.

title.description: Title of the favorited game for fast display.

image.description: Banner image URL of the target game.

Rating.title: Game Rating
Rating.description: User rating assigned to a specific game.

userId.description: Reference UID of the rating user.

Comment.title: Game Discussion Comment
Comment.description: Comments and replies on a specific game.

userId.description: UID of the user posting the comment.

username.description: Cached username at the time of comment.

parentId.description: Optional parent comment ID if this is a reply.

likedBy.description: List of user UIDs who liked this comment.

isReported.description: True if flagged as potential toxic content or spam.

reportsCount.description: Number of unique moderation reports received.

username.description: Cached display username of the owner.

title.description: Title of the custom collection list.

description.description: Description of the list's play style or theme.

games.description: Array of game objects containing game details.

AffiliateLink.title: Affiliate Link config
AffiliateLink.description: Platform or store-specific affiliate path parameters.

platform.description: Target storefront, e.g., Steam, Epic, GOG.

affiliateUrl.description: Full affiliate URL pointing to the checkout page.

clicks.description: Analytical click count tracked by the platform.

AffiliateClick.title: Affiliate Click Event Details
AffiliateClick.description: Event logged whenever an affiliate transition occurs.

userId.description: Optional user UID who clicked the link.

clickedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when click event occurred.

AdminDoc.title: Admin Reference Document
AdminDoc.description: Minimal document indicating presence of administrative permissions.

SystemSettings.title: System Settings
SystemSettings.description: Global website configuration options including integrated SEO keys.

googleSearchConsoleKey.description: Verification tag string for Google Search Console.

googleAnalyticsId.description: Active Measurement ID for Google Analytics streaming.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last config adjustment.

ratings/{ratingId}.description: Contains user-defined score ratings for tracking preferences.

comments/{commentId}.description: Global user comments, reviews, and replies.

lists/{listId}.description: Custom curated gaming lists created by the user community.

affiliate_links/{linkId}.description: Configurable purchase and landing links managed by site admins.

affiliate_clicks/{clickId}.description: Logged analytic events for purchase routing clicks.
